positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a friendly cosmic fox (kitsune) spirit, rendered in a neo-art deco and celestial style. The fox should have luminous, gradient fur accents and large, expressive, glowing eyes. It is seated elegantly among stylized celestial flora and geometric mandalas, surrounded by floating nebulae elements and constellation lines. The composition should feature a strong central silhouette with high contrast between the fox and the deep space background. Use a limited but vibrant palette of sapphire blues, amethyst purples, gold leaf accents, and ethereal teal. The artwork must have clean, defined edges and strong graphic quality, suitable for repeating apparel print. Vector illustration style, highly detailed, flat graphic elements merged with luminous digital painting. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, grainy, bokeh, signature, text, watermark, messy, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifact, low detail, muted colors
